Mirrored only `apps/operations-web/app/relay-resource-explorer.tsx` and `apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.smoke.spec.ts` from `/home/olares/code/apex/apex-power-ops-platform` to `C:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform`.

Ran `git diff --check` on the two mirrored source/test files; it passed with only Git LF-to-CRLF warnings.
Found existing user-level `pnpm` shim at `C:/Users/jjswe/AppData/Roaming/npm/pnpm.cmd` version `10.0.0` without install or package-manager activation/download.
Ran `pnpm build`; it passed, with only the existing `baseline-browser-mapping` freshness warning.
Ran focused Playwright browser smoke `playwright test tests/browser-shell.smoke.spec.ts -g "relay browser requires explicit selection before loading bounded compare details"`; it passed 1 test.
Confirmed no package or lockfile changes and no listener remained on port 3030 after Playwright completed.

Did not publish, commit, push, host-resync, mutate packages or lockfiles, install dependencies, rewrite remotes, approve migration, expand AI-services, change Gitea/code-hosting, change canonical-hosting, or mutate `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform`.
